Turings are human level [[ai]]
[[Category:Sapients]]
[[sn:Turings]][[Category:Sapient Psychology]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Turings]][[sn:Turings]]Contrary to popular belief one does not need to merely pass a turing test to be a Turing. [[Elizas]] pass turing tests without being Turingrade
==References==
[[Category:Turings]][[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
